commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the LORD sent against him bands of the Chaldeans, and bands of the Syrians, and bands of the Moabites, and bands of the children of Ammon, and sent them against Judah to destroy it, according to the word of the LORD, which he spoke by his servants the prophets. Latrunculos. Bands or parties of men, who pillaged and plundered wherever they came. (Challoner) See chap. , and Judges xi. Nabuchodonosor could not come in person. Holda, supra chap. , and Isaias xx. , and Jeremias xiv.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The Lord sent against him the rovers: Latrunculos. Bands or parties of men, who pillaged and plundered wherever they came.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
